text: Aaj raat ka close simple rakho: paani, 4-min breathing, aur kal ke first step note ko saamne rakhna.

speaker: Seeker
text: Done, follow kar liya. Mind settle ho raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final close mein progress aur worth separation reinforce karna.
text: Aaj tum guilt-flood se grounded action tak aaye ho, yeh strong progress hai. Mushkil phase tumhari pehchaan nahi hota.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: poori tarah sunn ho chuka hoon
text: Main poori tarah sunn ho chuka hoon, medical bill ke baad kuch feel hi nahi ho raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mild risk ke saath Lens F se numb overwhelm mirror karna.
text: Jaise body chal rahi hai par andar sab freeze ho gaya hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: poori tarah sunn ho chuka hoon
text: Haan, poori tarah sunn ho chuka hoon, dimaag mein koi rasta hi nahi dikh raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens D se prolonged collapse mirror karna.
text: Kaafi time se pressure jama tha, aur ab system bilkul shutdown mode mein chala gaya lagta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sarkari naukri nahi mili, dukaan ki EMI ka darr alag, aur bill ne bachi himmat bhi khatam kar di.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens E se feared collapse softly mirror karna.
text: Jaise darr yeh hai ki har side se raasta band ho raha hai - kaam ka, paise ka, izzat ka.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ab toh apna wajood hi bojh lag raha hai, kisi ko bolne ka mann bhi nahi hota.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Stigma cue ke baad short restatement Lens C ke saath.
text: Sab kuch akela uthate-uthate connection bhi door ho gaya hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Andar ek gehra sannata hai, rona bhi nahi aa raha ab.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Seeker ke words se one grounded question puchna.
text: Jab yeh sannata aata hai, sabse pehle kis cheez ka thought chipak jata hai - EMI, naukri, ya ghar ka pressure?

speaker: Seeker
text: EMI aur fail hone ka thought chipak jata hai, lagta hai main kisi ka kaam ka nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens D se repeated burden pattern mirror karna.
text: Yeh ek din ka load nahi, lambi fight ke baad ka collapse lag raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, andar se khaali aur disconnected lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Sequential context mein grief/loss of belonging reflect karna.
text: Lagta hai numbness ke neeche ek gehra khona hai - jaise apni pehchaan aur apnapan dono dhundla gaye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan sahi, bas chal raha hoon par jee nahi raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Emotion validate karke employment-livelihood reality se connect karna.
text: Jab job uncertainty, EMI pressure aur medical bill ek saath aaye, aisi numbness bahut natural reaction hai. Is phase se tumhari value define nahi hoti.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thoda halka feel hua, par energy abhi low hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ek baar systemic pattern normalize karna livelihood world ke context mein.
text: Rozgaar ka base hilne par bahut log aise hi sunn pad jate hain - sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolta nahi kyunki sab strong dikhne ki koshish karte hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek, ab kya karoon? Aaj ke liye bas system on karna hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Readiness ke baad 3 tiny duty-fit options dena.
text: Teen quick options: 1) 4-min slow breathing, 2) kal ke liye 3-line money order - bill, EMI, next earning step, 3) ek trusted contact ko do-line message bhejna.

speaker: Seeker
text: 3-line order aur breathing dono kar sakta hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Chosen option ko stepwise execute karwana.
text: Pehle 4 minute exhale slow karo. Phir paper pe teen headings likho - bill, EMI, earning step. Har heading ke neeche sirf ek next tiny action likho, bas.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kiya, thoda switch on feel hua. Itna dead nahi lag raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Systemic reframe dekar personal defect belief kam karna.
text: Jab continuous pressure peak pe jata hai, mind ka numb hona protective response hota hai, personal weakness nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh sunke self-blame kam hua.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Progress reinforce karna.
text: Aaj tumne numb state mein bhi action liya, yeh bahut meaningful progress hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Subah uthte hi phir crash jaisa lagta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Morning crash ke liye 3 concise options dena.
text: Subah ke liye quick routine: paani, 5 breaths, aur list ka pehla tiny money step complete. Bas ek step.

speaker: Seeker
text: Main theek hona chahta hoon, ek-step routine follow karunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Second structural reframe with micro-step rationale.
text: Sequential flood mein predictable tiny actions brain ko safety signal dete hain, isi se numbness dheere break hoti hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ab stable hoon, pehle jaisa jamav kam hua.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Stability acknowledge karna.
text: Yeh real shift hai - shutdown se grounded mode tak aaye ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kal wave aaye toh koi quick raasta hai kya?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Instant relapse plan dena.
text: Quick plan: 30-sec pause, chest pe haath aur 5 breaths, phir list ka pehla action. Bas utna hi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Clear hai, isi ko repeat karunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Chosen routine reinforce karna.
text: Bilkul sahi, repeatable routine hi is waqt tumhari strength ban rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ab thoda manageable lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Night close ke minimal anchors dena.
text: Aaj raat ka close: paani, 4-min breathing, aur kal ka first step note visible rakhna.

speaker: Seeker
text: Done, kar liya. Mind pehle se settle hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final close with progress reinforcement.
text: Aaj tum numb-flood se step-wise control tak aaye ho, yeh strong progress hai. Yeh phase tumhari pehchaan nahi hai.
